Home / About Us
Our Firm

A top-tier manufacturer, supplier, stockist & exporter

Bombay Earthing House has built its reputation on the strength of its comprehensive range of earthing and lightning protection products — Copper Bonded Earth Rods, Pipe Electrodes, Lightning Arresters, Earth Plates, Cable Trays and more — all manufactured at our own Mumbai facility.

Every product is manufactured to national and international standards (IS, IEC, BS), tested in-house, and supplied with complete documentation. Our ISO 9001:2008 certification reflects our commitment to consistent quality on every order.

Get In Touch

Clients Served

Projects Done
ISO 9001
Certified
40+
Professionals

Quality First

ISO 9001:2008 certified. Every product tested before despatch. Test certificates issued with every order.

Global Reach

Trusted by clients across India and internationally for quality earthing and lightning protection products.

On-Time Delivery

Customised packaging and strict delivery timetables — domestic and international orders handled equally.

Expert Team

40+ professionals across manufacturing, quality control, sales and logistics at our Mumbai facilities.

Full Portfolio

Copper bonded rods, pipe electrodes, lightning arresters, earth plates, cable trays and accessories — all from one manufacturer.

Documentation

Test certificates, material datasheets and compliance documents supplied with every order.

Ready to specify your earthing system?

Talk to our engineering team — soil resistivity, electrode type, installation timelines.

Contact Us

India's trusted manufacturer, supplier, stockist and exporter of copper bonded earth rods, pipe electrodes, lightning arresters and earthing accessories — serving 550+ clients worldwide.
